title: No More Getting Blocked (PVP Kit) By SilverMan
description: PVP Pack To Lower/Get Rid Of Some Things!
body:
This Pack Gets Rid Of The Pumpkin Blur, The Bobber, The Freeze (From Powdered Snow) and The Lava, Water, And Fog Overlay!

This Pack Adds Lower Fire, Lower Shield, and Better Shown Invisibility Particles!
